CREATE TABLE BPEL_SCRIPTS (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, script_name VARCHAR(255), script_content TEXT, is_edit_mode BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO BPEL_SCRIPTS (id, script_name, script_content, is_edit_mode) VALUES (1, 'LoanFlow.bpel', '<bpel:process ...>', true);
UPDATE BPEL_SCRIPTS SET script_content = '<bpel:process updated ...>' WHERE id = 1 AND is_edit_mode = true;
SELECT script_content FROM BPEL_SCRIPTS WHERE id = 1 AND is_edit_mode = true;
UPDATE BPEL_SCRIPTS SET script_name = 'LoanFlow_Updated.bpel' WHERE id = 1 AND is_edit_mode = true;
UPDATE BPEL_SCRIPTS SET script_content = '<bpel:process recursive <bpel:invoke ... />>' WHERE id = 1 AND is_edit_mode = true;
SELECT script_name, script_content FROM BPEL_SCRIPTS WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM BPEL_SCRIPTS WHERE is_edit_mode = true);
UPDATE BPEL_SCRIPTS SET is_edit_mode = false WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BPEL_SCRIPTS WHERE is_edit_mode = true;
INSERT INTO BPEL_SCRIPTS (id, script_name, script_content, is_edit_mode) VALUES (2, 'AuditFlow.bpel', '<bpel:process ...>', true);
UPDATE BPEL_SCRIPTS SET script_content = '<bpel:process modified ...>' WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM BPEL_SCRIPTS WHERE script_name LIKE '%Flow%');
UPDATE BPEL_SCRIPTS SET is_edit_mode = false WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM BPEL_SCRIPTS WHERE script_name = 'LoanFlow.bpel');
